_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
specialty: Urology, Pediatric Surgery, Plastic & Reconstructive Surgery
clinical_indications: Follow-up visit usually after a week of the Hypospadias repair surgery
Purpose is to remove stunt (If applicable) and examine any infection and progress post-surgery

preauth.label: Clinical notes of current visit detailed history, signs & symptoms, indication for procedure
Discharge Summary of last admission for Hypospadias repair surgery

claim.label: Detailed clinical notes/discharge summary of current visit
Post procedure USG / UFM / Urine Routine report

ppd_preauth.q: Did physical examination detect structural abnormalities or ventral penile curvature?

cpd_claim.q: Did physical examination detect structural abnormalities or ventral penile curvature?

common_queries: Physical examination findings of structural abnormalities or ventral penile curvature for original hypospadias not documented
Clinical notes of current visit with detailed history, signs & symptoms, indication for procedure missing or incomplete at pre-authorization
Discharge Summary of last admission for Hypospadias repair surgery missing at pre-authorization
Detailed clinical notes/discharge summary of current visit missing or incomplete at claim submission
Post procedure USG / UFM / Urine Routine report missing at claim submission

additional_information.min_doctor_qualification_desirable: MCh / DNB or equivalent in (Urology/Pediatric surgery/Plastic surgery)
clinical_key_pointers: Opening of the urethra at a location other than the tip of the penis
Hooded appearance of the penis because only the top half of the penis is covered by foreskin
Follow-up visit: Usually after a week of the Hypospadias repair surgery. Purpose is to remove stunt (If applicable) and examine any infection and progress post-surgery.
